---
title: "Joseph Bulbulia"
description: "About me"
image: "jb.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/joseph-bulbulia-1ba5a514/?originalSubdomain=nz"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/go_bayes"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://twitter.com/go_bayes"
  - label: ORCID iD
    url: "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5861-2056"
site: distill::distill_website
output:
  postcards::trestles
---
 
I am a classically trained data scientist living in the San Francisco Bay Area. 
Currently I work on the Oculus team at Facebook. I love talking about baseball, 
true crime podcasts, and causal inference.
